'''Petro''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] pilot in [[Crimson Squadron (Galactic Empire)|Crimson Squadron]], stationed at [[Kiidan]] on [[Cilpar]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].

==Biography==
Petro insulted [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron's]] [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]] (who was undercover as an Imperial pilot at the time) as an [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaanian]] coward upon meeting him. Tycho jumped on Petro and struck him several times to demonstrate that he was not a pacifist.

Fellow pilot [[Aldrich Kugel]] described Petro as 'a bit aggressive' and a 'jerk', who nursed a grudge "like a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] nurses her cubs".

{{Char-stub}}
